entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `text` TEXT NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `scopeKey` TEXT, `personaKeysCsv` TEXT, `enabled` INTEGER NOT NULL, `pinned` INTEGER NOT NULL, `createdAtUtcMs` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAtUtcMs` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_ai_contexts_scopeKey
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_ai_contexts_scopeKey` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`scopeKey`)

indices.name: index_ai_contexts_enabled
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_ai_contexts_enabled` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`enabled`)

indices.name: index_ai_contexts_pinned
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_ai_contexts_pinned` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`pinned`)

indices.name: index_ai_contexts_personaKeysCsv
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_ai_contexts_personaKeysCsv` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`personaKeysCsv`)

indices.name: index_ai_contexts_personaKeysCsv_scopeKey
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_ai_contexts_personaKeysCsv_scopeKey` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`personaKeysCsv`, `scopeKey`)
